title: Master the Orinoco GC Architecture
description: Explain the components and phases of the Orinoco GC architecture. Analyze the impact of Scavenging (Young Generation) and Mark-Sweep-Compact (Old Generation) on application performance. Describe how incremental marking reduces GC pause latency.
objectives: Explain the components and phases of the Orinoco GC architecture.
Analyze the impact of Scavenging (Young Generation) and Mark-Sweep-Compact (Old Generation) on application performance.
Describe how incremental marking reduces GC pause latency.
